parameters.prompt:
={{ "You are an email classifier. Return valid JSON only. Classify into: newsletter, action, social, promotions, career, fyi, spam. Return {"category": "category_name"}.

From: " + ($json.from || "unknown") + "
Subject: " + ($json.subject || "unknown") + "
Body: " + (($json.cleaned_body || $json.body_text || $json.snippet || "").slice(0, 300)) }}

assignments.name: label_id
assignments.value: ={{ {newsletter: 'Label_2', action: 'Label_1', social: 'Label_3', promotions: 'Label_4', career: 'Label_5', fyi: 'Label_6', spam: 'Label_7'}[$json.final_category] || 'Label_6' }}
